fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key, generated client-side (crypto.randomUUID)

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Expense amount; must be > 0

fields.name: description
fields.description: Merchant name or short description shown in expense rows

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description: Reference to the Category entity; drives color, icon, and grouping

fields.name: date
fields.description: Expense date; no future dates allowed (enforced in form)

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.description: Enum-like label: 'Cash' | 'Debit Card' | 'Credit Card' | 'UPI/Other'

fields.name: note
fields.description: Optional user note; max 100 characters

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Client-side UTC timestamp of record creation

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Client-side UTC timestamp of last modification

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key, generated client-side

fields.name: name
fields.description: Display name of the category; unique(name)

fields.name: color
fields.description: Tailwind color token or hex string (e.g., 'blue-500', '#3B82F6') used for dots, borders, chart segments

fields.name: icon
fields.description: Icon identifier (emoji or icon name) shown in category chip and expense row circle

fields.name: isDefault
fields.description: True for seed/system categories; false for user-created categories. Default categories cannot be deleted.

fields.name: sortOrder
fields.description: Display order in category selector grid and legend lists

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Client-side UTC timestamp of record creation

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key

fields.name: month
fields.description: ISO month string 'YYYY-MM'; unique(month) — one budget record per calendar month

fields.name: monthlyLimit
fields.description: Total spending cap for the month; defaults to UserSettings.defaultMonthlyBudget at creation time

fields.name: currency
fields.description: ISO 4217 currency code: 'USD' | 'EUR' | 'GBP' | 'INR' | 'JPY'

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Client-side UTC timestamp of record creation

fields.name: id
fields.description: Singleton record; always a fixed well-known UUID ('settings-singleton')

fields.name: currency
fields.description: Active display currency: 'USD' | 'EUR' | 'GBP' | 'INR' | 'JPY'. Default 'USD'.

fields.name: defaultMonthlyBudget
fields.description: Default monthly budget applied when creating a new Budget record. Default 2000.00.

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Client-side UTC timestamp of last settings change; triggers currency-change toast

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description: Reference to Category; unique(categoryId, month)

fields.name: month
fields.description: ISO month string 'YYYY-MM'; unique(categoryId, month)

fields.name: limitAmount
fields.description: Per-category spending cap for the given month (feat-025)

fields.name: createdAt
fields.description: Client-side UTC timestamp of record creation

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key

fields.name: description
fields.description: Merchant/description text shown in suggestion chip (e.g., 'Starbucks')

fields.name: amount
fields.description: Pre-fill amount for the suggestion chip

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description: Category to auto-select when chip is tapped

fields.name: paymentMethod
fields.description: Payment method to auto-select: 'Cash' | 'Debit Card' | 'Credit Card' | 'UPI/Other'

fields.name: frequency
fields.description: Count of how many times this description+category+amount combo has been logged; used to rank top 3-4 chips

fields.name: lastUsedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of most recent use; used as tiebreaker when frequency is equal

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key; unique(month)

fields.name: month
fields.description: ISO month string 'YYYY-MM'; unique(month). Derived/cached aggregate — recomputed via Dexie liveQuery on expense mutations.

fields.name: totalSpent
fields.description: Sum of all expense amounts for the month

fields.name: transactionCount
fields.description: Count of expense records for the month

fields.name: dailyAverage
fields.description: totalSpent / number of days elapsed in month (or total days if month is past)

fields.name: budgetLimit
fields.description: Snapshot of Budget.monthlyLimit for this month at time of last recompute

fields.name: budgetStatus
fields.description: 'On Track' (< 80% spent) | 'Heads Up' (80–100%) | 'Over Budget' (> 100%)

fields.name: remainingAmount
fields.description: budgetLimit − totalSpent; can be negative when over budget

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of last recomputation

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key; unique(categoryId, month)

fields.name: categoryId
fields.description: Reference to Category; unique(categoryId, month)

fields.name: month
fields.description: ISO month string 'YYYY-MM'

fields.name: totalAmount
fields.description: Sum of expense amounts for this category in this month

fields.name: percentage
fields.description: totalAmount / MonthSummary.totalSpent * 100; used for donut chart segments and stacked bar

fields.name: transactionCount
fields.description: Count of expense records for this category in this month

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of last recomputation

fields.name: id
fields.description: Primary key; unique(date)

fields.name: date
fields.description: Calendar date 'YYYY-MM-DD'; unique(date)

fields.name: totalAmount
fields.description: Sum of expense amounts for this date; used for bar/line chart data points

fields.name: transactionCount
fields.description: Count of expense records for this date; shown in chart hover tooltip

fields.name: updatedAt
fields.description: Timestamp of last recomputation
